title: Google Maps Place
description: A place as represented by the Google Maps Places API (New). Contains comprehensive information about a physical location including identity, contact details, location data, ratings, reviews, opening hours, and service options. Based on the Google Maps Platform Places API documentation.

name.description: The resource name of this place in the format places/{placeId}

id.description: The unique place ID. A textual identifier that uniquely identifies a place in the Google Places database and on Google Maps.

displayName.description: The localized display name of the place, suitable for short textual identification

types.description: A set of type tags for this place. A place can have multiple types. Full list defined by Google Maps Place Types.

primaryType.description: The primary type of this place, representing the most specific type tag

primaryTypeDisplayName.description: The display name of the primary type, localized to the request language

nationalPhoneNumber.description: The place's phone number in national format

internationalPhoneNumber.description: The place's phone number in international format, including country code

formattedAddress.description: The full human-readable address for this place, including street, city, state/province, postal code, and country

shortFormattedAddress.description: A short human-readable address, typically including only the street address and city

addressComponents.description: The individual address components of the place's address, broken down by type (street number, route, locality, etc.)

location.description: The geographic location of the place as latitude/longitude coordinates

viewport.description: A viewport suitable for displaying the place on a map of average size

rating.description: The place's overall rating based on aggregated user reviews, on a scale of 1.0 to 5.0

userRatingCount.description: The total number of user ratings that contributed to the place's overall rating

googleMapsUri.description: A URL pointing to this place's page on Google Maps

websiteUri.description: The authoritative website URL for this place, if known

regularOpeningHours.description: The regular (non-holiday) opening hours for this place

currentOpeningHours.description: The current opening hours, which may differ from regular hours due to holidays or special events

priceLevel.description: The price level of the place, indicating relative cost

businessStatus.description: The operational status of the business

utcOffsetMinutes.description: Number of minutes this place's current timezone is offset from UTC

reviews.description: A list of up to 5 reviews for this place, sorted by relevance

photos.description: Photos associated with this place, including references for fetching photo media

editorialSummary.description: A brief editorial summary of the place, written by Google

adrFormatAddress.description: The place's address in adr microformat (http://microformats.org/wiki/adr)

iconMaskBaseUri.description: A URL to an SVG icon mask that can be used to represent the place's type

iconBackgroundColor.description: The background color for the place's type icon, in hex format

plusCode.description: The Open Location Code (plus code) for this place

accessibilityOptions.description: Accessibility features available at this place

parkingOptions.description: Parking options available at this place

paymentOptions.description: Payment methods accepted at this place

dineIn.description: Whether the place supports dine-in service

takeout.description: Whether the place offers takeout service

delivery.description: Whether the place offers delivery service

curbsidePickup.description: Whether the place offers curbside pickup

servesVegetarianFood.description: Whether the place serves vegetarian food

LocalizedText.description: A localized text string with its associated language code

languageCode.description: The BCP-47 language code of the text

LatLng.description: A geographic coordinate expressed as latitude and longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84)

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. Must be in the range [-90.0, +90.0].

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees. Must be in the range [-180.0, +180.0].

Viewport.description: A rectangular viewport defined by its low (southwest) and high (northeast) points

low.description: The southwest corner of the viewport

high.description: The northeast corner of the viewport

AddressComponent.description: An individual component of a structured address

longText.description: The full text description of the address component

shortText.description: An abbreviated textual name for the address component

types.description: An array of strings indicating the type of this address component (e.g., locality, administrative_area_level_1, country)

languageCode.description: The language code for this component

PlusCode.description: An Open Location Code (plus code) representing a geographic area

globalCode.description: The full plus code (global code) that identifies a geographic area

compoundCode.description: The compound plus code, which includes a locality reference for easier human readability

OpeningHours.description: Information about when a place is open for business

openNow.description: Whether the place is currently open

periods.description: Time periods the place is open during the week, structured as open/close pairs

weekdayDescriptions.description: Localized strings describing the opening hours for each day of the week

Period.description: A single time period when a place is open, defined by open and close points

open.description: The time when the place opens

close.description: The time when the place closes. Absent for places open 24 hours.

TimePoint.description: A specific point in time on a weekly schedule

day.description: Day of the week as an integer (0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday)

Review.description: A user-submitted review of a place

name.description: The resource name of the review

relativePublishTimeDescription.description: A human-readable relative time description (e.g., 'a month ago')

rating.description: The star rating of this review, from 1.0 to 5.0

originalText.description: The review text in its original language

publishTime.description: The timestamp when the review was published

AuthorAttribution.description: Attribution information for a content author

displayName.description: The display name of the author

uri.description: A URI to the author's profile

photoUri.description: A URI to the author's profile photo

Photo.description: A photo associated with a place

name.description: The resource name of the photo in the format places/{placeId}/photos/{photoReference}

widthPx.description: Maximum available width of the photo in pixels

heightPx.description: Maximum available height of the photo in pixels

AccessibilityOptions.description: Accessibility features available at a place

wheelchairAccessibleParking.description: Whether the place has wheelchair-accessible parking

wheelchairAccessibleEntrance.description: Whether the place has a wheelchair-accessible entrance

wheelchairAccessibleRestroom.description: Whether the place has a wheelchair-accessible restroom

wheelchairAccessibleSeating.description: Whether the place has wheelchair-accessible seating

ParkingOptions.description: Parking options available at a place

freeParkingLot.description: Whether the place has a free parking lot

paidParkingLot.description: Whether the place has a paid parking lot

freeStreetParking.description: Whether free street parking is available nearby

paidStreetParking.description: Whether paid street parking is available nearby

valetParking.description: Whether the place offers valet parking

freeGarageParking.description: Whether the place has a free parking garage

paidGarageParking.description: Whether the place has a paid parking garage

PaymentOptions.description: Payment methods accepted at a place

acceptsCreditCards.description: Whether the place accepts credit cards

acceptsDebitCards.description: Whether the place accepts debit cards

acceptsCashOnly.description: Whether the place only accepts cash

acceptsNfc.description: Whether the place accepts NFC/contactless payments
